name: profile-auto-load-followups
goal: Close 3 eng-lead follow-ups from profile-auto-load: wire /build to call auto_load, flip 4 agent role files to active self-trigger framing, fix hotfix.md LEARNINGS.md mis-attribution.

userStories.title: build.md — Phase 2 Step 1 auto_load call + line 99 template
userStories.description: Add new first bullet to Phase 2 Step 1 (Prepare Context) that calls AGENTS.md auto_load for the task's target files. Replace developer subagent prompt template line 99 passive 'if available' bracket with 'loaded via auto_load' reference. BOTH edits in ONE commit (atomicity mitigation, pre-mortem Risk 2).
acceptanceCriteria: grep 'loaded via auto_load' commands/build.md returns 1 line
Phase 2 Step 1 Prepare Context list has **Follow AGENTS.md `auto_load` procedure** as first bullet
git log -1 --stat commands/build.md shows both edits in the SAME commit

userStories.title: Agent role files — active auto_load self-trigger framing
userStories.description: Rewrite the passive 'When loaded with an expertise profile' / 'Layer 4 is optional' lines in 4 agent files (orchestrator:30, developer:24, reviewer:24, product-manager:25) to active-voice self-trigger. Exact old→new strings prescribed in PRD (pre-mortem Risk 1 mitigation). Verify with 8 grep checks (Risk 4 mitigation). One commit for all 4 files.
acceptanceCriteria: grep 'When loaded with an expertise' build/agents/*.md returns 0 lines
grep 'Layer 4 is optional' build/agents/orchestrator.md returns 0 lines
grep -l 'auto_load' build/agents/orchestrator.md build/agents/developer.md build/agents/reviewer.md build/agents/product-manager.md returns 4 lines
grep 'Before dispatching a subagent' build/agents/orchestrator.md returns 1 line
grep 'Before touching code' build/agents/developer.md returns 1 line
grep 'Before shaping technical scope' build/agents/product-manager.md returns 1 line
git diff --stat build/agents/ shows ≤ 4 line changes per file (surgical, no scope creep)

userStories.title: hotfix.md — split parenthetical, correct LEARNINGS.md attribution
userStories.description: Split the parenthetical after auto_load reference: auto_load loads profile bodies only; LEARNINGS.md is a separate read step. Use anchor-string grep for target detection, NOT line numbers (pre-mortem Risk 3 mitigation — parent PRD's edits may have shifted line 38).
acceptanceCriteria: grep 'Loads scope-matched PROFILE.md bodies and any LEARNINGS.md' commands/hotfix.md returns 0 lines
grep 'Loads scope-matched PROFILE.md bodies. Separately, read any LEARNINGS.md' commands/hotfix.md returns 1 line
git diff --stat commands/hotfix.md shows ~2 line changes (surgical)
